message:
perf(fusion): parallelize embedding and lexical search with rayon::join; add poll_immediate for sync-in-async futures

- Add rayon dependency to frankensearch-fusion
- Replace sequential fast_embedder.embed() + run_lexical() with
  rayon::join, executing both on separate threads for true parallelism
  — both trait implementations are sync-in-async (complete on first poll)
- Add poll_immediate() helper that polls a pinned future exactly once,
  exploiting the sync-in-async property to call embedder/lexical from
  synchronous rayon contexts without an async runtime
- Inline the lexical result processing to avoid the now-unused
  run_lexical async method (marked #[allow(dead_code)])

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
